name: com.ucl.ubiq-genie
description: Server-assisted collaborative mixed reality features for Ubiq.

author.name: Virtual Environments and Computer Graphics Group, University College London

samples.description: Minimal scene with Ubiq-Genie networking set up. Use as a starting point for new apps.
Voice-driven virtual assistant with avatar animation and speech indicators.
Captures the current camera view and sends it to the server for a textual scene description.
AI-generated textures applied to scene materials based on keywords.
Records the scene from a virtual camera and streams to the server.
